name: Pork Tenderloin with Mustard Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pork tenderloin in a 24-ounce shallow casserole.
2. Sprinkle with salt and onion.
3. Cover with vented plastic wrap.
4. Microwave on medium (50%) power for 4 minutes.
5. Rotate the casserole one-quarter turn.
6. Microwave an additional 4 minutes.
7. Mix the remaining ingredients in a small bowl.
8. Spoon the mixture over the pork.
9. Return to the microwave and cover with vented plastic wrap.
10. Turn the casserole one-quarter turn every 3 minutes.
11. Cook until the pork is done, about 4 to 6 minutes total.
